description: Proposal 0035: a host filters its discovered catalog to what the verified caller may invoke. A capability is VISIBLE to a caller iff its descriptor.policy.allowed_actors is empty/absent (open) OR includes the caller. An anonymous/unnamed caller (null) sees the unfiltered catalog (backward-compatible). Hiding is least-disclosure; the invocation gate (policy_blocked, proposal 0034) is the security backstop. All three reference impls agree on the visibility decision.

cases.note: open capability (empty allowlist) visible to any caller
restricted capability visible to a listed caller
restricted capability HIDDEN from a non-listed caller
anonymous caller (null) sees the unfiltered catalog — backward-compatible
multi-actor allowlist: a listed caller sees it
